hooks.name: validate-design-completeness
hooks.instructions: Check design.md for all required sections per spec-standards.md: Overview, Affected Components, Data Model Changes, API Changes, Sequence Diagrams, Method Signatures, Observability, Error Handling Strategy, Testing Requirements. Output ✅ DESIGN READY or ⚠️ INCOMPLETE with exact list of failing sections.

hooks.name: validate-tasks-sequencing
hooks.instructions: Verify: (1) first task is writing failing tests, (2) last task is integration or smoke test, (3) every task has a label [BE][FE][DB][INFRA][TEST], (4) all dependency references point to valid TASK-IDs, (5) no task implies more than 4 hours. Output ✅ TASKS READY or ⚠️ ISSUES FOUND with line-level callouts.

hooks.name: validate-arb-checklist
hooks.instructions: Verify all 9 mandatory ARB sections from arch-standards.md are present and non-empty. Verify Requirements Traceability Table has at least one REQ-ID. Output ✅ ARB READY or 🔴 NOT READY with exact missing sections. Also check: if the ADR touches any compliance-critical integrations (YOTI, OneTrust, PMI Databases, Azure EntraID, Akamai, GTM/GA, Sentry, New Relic), verify the checklist includes a compliance/security review sign-off item. If it is missing, flag as ⚠️ MISSING COMPLIANCE SIGN-OFF.

hooks.name: validate-gherkin-coverage
hooks.instructions: When a .feature file is saved, check it meets coverage requirements: (1) at least one @smoke scenario exists, (2) at least one error/negative scenario exists, (3) at least one authorisation scenario exists, (4) every Scenario has a descriptive name, (5) no When step contains more than one action (look for 'and' connecting two verbs in a single When line), (6) all scenarios are tagged with at least @regression plus one feature tag. Output ✅ FEATURE READY or ⚠️ COVERAGE GAPS with specific scenario names missing.

hooks.name: validate-epic-completeness
hooks.instructions: When epic.md is saved, verify: (1) Problem Statement is present and not generic, (2) at least one Success Metric with a numeric target exists, (3) In Scope and Out of Scope sections are both non-empty, (4) at least one user story with acceptance criteria in Gherkin format exists, (5) Definition of Done checklist is present. Output ✅ EPIC READY FOR PIPELINE or ⚠️ INCOMPLETE with specific gaps.

hooks.name: validate-no-credentials-in-specs
hooks.instructions: When any spec file is saved, scan for patterns that should never appear: (1) strings matching token/password/secret patterns (long alphanumeric strings after = or : characters), (2) email addresses that look real rather than placeholder (not containing 'example', 'placeholder', 'consumer', 'user'), (3) any text that looks like a real person's full name in a context suggesting real consumer data rather than a persona name. If found, output: 🔴 CREDENTIAL/PII WARNING — [file name]: [description]. Do not output the actual sensitive value. Do not block the save — only warn.
